blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,333 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
